title: Compass Prediction Quiz
instructions_for_student: For each scenario, predict whether the compass needle will move towards or away from the approaching bar magnet. Try to get all four correct!

additionalProps.title: Compass Prediction Quiz
additionalProps.subtitle: Predict how the compass needle will react!

rounds.explanation: N–N are like poles — they repel, so the needle moves away.
N–S are unlike poles — they attract, so the needle moves towards the magnet.
S–N are unlike poles — they attract, so the needle moves towards the magnet.
S–S are like poles — they repel, so the needle moves away.

_tool_meta.subject: Science
_tool_meta.activity_reference: Activity 4.6: Let us experiment — Compass needle and a magnet
_tool_meta.icons: inline SVG only — no lucide-react or other icon libraries imported

agent_readme.description: A 4-round prediction quiz. Each round shows a CSS/SVG compass with its needle at rest and a bar magnet approaching from the right. The student sees which pole of the magnet faces which pole of the needle and clicks one of two buttons. Correct answers lock green; wrong answers lock red. Both show a one-line explanation. After 4 rounds a score screen appears with per-round breakdown, star rating, and the golden rule summary.
agent_readme.validation: correctAnswer field must be 'toward' or 'away'; determined by pole interaction physics (unlike = attract = toward, like = repel = away)

title.description: Main heading shown at top of tool

subtitle.default: Predict how the compass needle will react!

rounds.description: Array of quiz rounds. Minimum 1, recommended 4 to cover all pole combos.

magnetPole.description: The pole of the bar magnet that faces the compass needle

needlePole.description: The pole of the compass needle that faces the approaching magnet

correctAnswer.description: Physics rule: unlike poles attract (toward), like poles repel (away)

explanation.description: One-line explanation shown after the student answers

rounds.explanation: N–S unlike poles attract — needle moves towards.
S–N unlike poles attract — needle moves towards.

customisation_examples._comment: 6-round extended quiz with repeated rounds for practice

additionalProps.title: Magnetic Force Challenge
additionalProps.subtitle: All 6 rounds — can you get a perfect score?

rounds.explanation: N–N like poles repel — needle moves away.
N–S unlike poles attract — needle moves towards.
S–N unlike poles attract — needle moves towards.
S–S like poles repel — needle moves away.
Like poles always repel — try to remember!
Unlike poles always attract — great job!

decision_tree.default_4_rounds: Use the default rounds array — covers all 4 pole combinations exactly once (N-N, N-S, S-N, S-S)
decision_tree.fewer_rounds: Remove rounds from the array; minimum 1 round required
decision_tree.extra_practice: Duplicate rounds or add new combinations for extended practice
decision_tree.change_explanations: Edit the 'explanation' field per round for curriculum-specific wording
